case_title: SILVESTRE, PEDRO LOPEZ VS FERNANDEZ, ALFREDO E. DBA DON QUIJOTE PROD.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVESTRE, PEDRO LOPEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ALFREDO E. DBA DON QUIJOTE PROD. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ALFREDO E. FERNANDEZ C/O DON QUIJOTE PRODS. RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SILVESTRE, PEDRO LOPEZ AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ALFREDO E. DBA DON QUIJOTE PROD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
